_comment: Kafka topic definitions for the Intraday Liquidity Monitoring Pipeline. Used by create_topics.sh and for documentation / CI validation.

topics.name: payments.rtgs
topics.description: Real-Time Gross Settlement payment events. Large-value, time-critical GBP transfers between banks via the Bank of England RTGS system.

topics.name: payments.chaps
topics.description: CHAPS (Clearing House Automated Payment System) payment events. Same-day sterling transfers, typically £1M–£100M.

topics.name: payments.internal
topics.description: Internal fund transfers between the bank's own settlement accounts. Lower value, higher frequency.

topics.name: payments.all
topics.description: Fan-out of all payment rails (RTGS + CHAPS + INTERNAL). LiquidityPositionEngine consumes exclusively from this topic. Producer writes every payment here in addition to its rail-specific topic.
topics.notes: Partition count matches LiquidityPositionEngine parallelism so each task reads exactly one partition.

topics.name: liquidity.warnings
topics.description: WARNING threshold breach alerts. Fired when available_balance < warning_threshold. Latency target: within 5 seconds of the triggering payment.

topics.name: liquidity.critical
topics.description: CRITICAL threshold breach alerts. Fired when available_balance < critical_threshold. Requires immediate treasury desk action.

topics.name: liquidity.thresholds
topics.description: Threshold update commands. Published by threshold_publisher.py (treasury desk CLI). Consumed by ThresholdManager which broadcasts updates to all LiquidityPositionEngine instances. Topic is COMPACTED so full threshold state can be replayed on restart.
topics.notes: 1 partition required — ThresholdManager parallelism=1 ensures single writer to BroadcastState. Compacted: key=currency:account keeps only latest threshold per account.

topics.name: payments.dlq
topics.description: Dead Letter Queue for payment messages rejected by LiquidityPositionEngine. A message lands here if it fails JSON parsing, schema validation (missing fields, invalid enum values, non-positive amount), or timestamp parsing. Ops can consume this topic to debug upstream producer issues and republish corrected messages to payments.all for reprocessing.

message_schema.raw: string (first 500 chars of the original message)
message_schema.payment_id: string | null (if extractable from the raw message)
message_schema.detected_at: string (ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when rejection was caught)

topics.notes: To replay: fix the upstream producer bug, then consume payments.dlq, correct the records, and republish to payments.all. Do not republish directly from DLQ without correction — the original message failed validation for a reason.

topics.name: ops.feed.health
topics.description: Payment feed liveness events. FeedStaleAlert fires when no payment arrives on a rail for 60 seconds (Flink EventTimeTimer). Recovery events fire when feed resumes.
